SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DENNIS WEBB--OWNER. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASK DENNIS TRANSPORATION LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JESUS ALEXANDER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
